scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='/data/.openclaw/openclaw.json';try{const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));if(!c.gateway)c.gateway={};if(!c.gateway.controlUi)c.gateway.controlUi={};c.gateway.controlUi.allowedOrigins=['https://openclaw-production-0173.up.railway.app'];fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));console.log('patched ok');}catch(e){console.log('patch error:',e.message);}" && node src/server.js
